ogTitle: Renison Bell vs Retreat: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Renison Bell and Retreat.
heading: Renison Bell vs Retreat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Renison Bell, Tasmania and Retreat, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Renison Bell has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Retreat (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Renison Bell or Retreat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Renison Bell has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Retreat scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Renison Bell scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Retreat scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Renison Bell or Retreat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Renison Bell has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
